'''ngapungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wadsetter|wadsetter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wadsetter|wadsetter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngapungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæpingith|ngæpingith]] || [[word:ngæpingij|ngæpingij]] || [[word:ngæpingish|ngæpingish]] || [[word:ngæpingi|ngæpingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngapupunguth|ngapupunguth]] || [[word:ngapupunguj|ngapupunguj]] || [[word:ngapupungush|ngapupungush]] || [[word:ngapupungu|ngapupungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngapunguth|ngapunguth]] || [[word:ngapunguj|ngapunguj]] || [[word:ngapungush|ngapungush]] || [[word:ngapungu|ngapungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngapufnguth|ngapufnguth]] || [[word:ngapufnguj|ngapufnguj]] || [[word:ngapufngush|ngapufngush]] || [[word:ngapufnguf|ngapufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngapunguthu|ngapunguthu]] || [[word:ngapunguju|ngapunguju]] || [[word:ngapungushu|ngapungushu]] || [[word:ngapunguku|ngapunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngapunguth|ngapunguth]] || [[word:ngapunguj|ngapunguj]] || [[word:ngapungush|ngapungush]] || [[word:ngapungu|ngapungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngapunguthul|ngapunguthul]] || [[word:ngapungujul|ngapungujul]] || [[word:ngapungushul|ngapungushul]] || [[word:ngapungukul|ngapungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngapunguthuthu|ngapunguthuthu]] || [[word:ngapungujuju|ngapungujuju]] || [[word:ngapungushushu|ngapungushushu]] || [[word:ngapunguku|ngapunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngapunguthun|ngapunguthun]] || [[word:ngapungujun|ngapungujun]] || [[word:ngapungushun|ngapungushun]] || [[word:ngapungukun|ngapungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngapunguthuoro|ngapunguthuoro]] || [[word:ngapungujuoro|ngapungujuoro]] || [[word:ngapungushuoro|ngapungushuoro]] || [[word:ngapungukuoro|ngapungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
